content:
Uline

May 2014 – Present Decade-plus of leadership progression through Marketing Analytics, BI, and AI.

Lead AI & Agentic Solutions Architect

Dec 2023 – Present

  • Strategic AI Consulting: Cross-functional leader providing technical expertise to 14 business units developing production-ready AI solutions.
  • Technical Governance: Established the organization’s first AI and Python governance frameworks, standardizing CI/CD workflows and code quality.
  • Agentic Orchestration: Architected “CommentGPT,” an LLM-based agent processing 2M+ customer comments annually, reducing issue detection time by 82%.
  • RAG Architecture: Deployed production-scale Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems for internal knowledge bases, cutting employee time-to-answer by 73%.

Senior Business Intelligence Developer

Mar 2021 – Dec 2023

  • Enterprise AI Roadmap: Spearheaded initial AI roadmaps and deployed early Azure OpenAI Proof of Concepts.
  • NLP Automation: Engineered NLP classification models for customer feedback, reclaiming 1,200+ annualized hours.

J&J Consulting Inc.

President / Principal Consultant | Nov 2019 – Feb 2021

  • Solution Delivery: Translated complex business problems into production-ready code, automating manual analytical workflows.
  • Full-Stack Data Science: Built end-to-end predictive analytics pipelines using Azure ML, Python, and SQL.

Education & Certifications

  • M.S. in Applied Economics / Statistics | Marquette University
  • B.S. in Economics / Marketing | Marquette University
  • AI Strategies for Business Transformation | Kellogg Executive Education
  • Fundamentals of Deep Learning | NVIDIA
